evals.name: specific-keyword-documentation-debt
evals.prompt: Write a blog article for the Promptless edu campaign about 'documentation debt'. Research the topic, plan the article, write it, and do an edit pass. Save the final MDX file to the outputs directory. Do NOT create a git branch, PR, or Slack notification -- this is a test run. Just produce the MDX article file.
evals.expected_output: A complete MDX file with proper frontmatter (title, subtitle, description, date, author, section, hidden), imported components (BlogNewsletterCTA, BlogRequestDemo), 800-1400 words, no em dashes, no tricolons, no 'X is not Y but Z' patterns, with BlogNewsletterCTA placed around 40-50% and BlogRequestDemo at the end.

assertions.name: has_complete_frontmatter
assertions.description: Article has all required frontmatter fields

assertions.name: imports_components
assertions.description: Article imports both required Astro components

evals.name: random-keyword-selection
evals.prompt: Run the Promptless edu campaign content pipeline. Pick a random keyword from the keyword list and generate a blog article. Save the final MDX file to the outputs directory. Do NOT create a git branch, PR, or Slack notification -- this is a test run.
evals.expected_output: A complete MDX file with a randomly selected keyword, proper frontmatter, correct style, 800-1400 words, following all Promptless writing conventions.

assertions.name: has_complete_frontmatter
assertions.description: Article has all required frontmatter fields

assertions.name: imports_components
assertions.description: Article imports both required Astro components
